folio.label: 48r
folio.l: ¢ Heere bigynnetú the Reues Tale ;
At Trompyngtou~ , nat fer fro Caumbrygge
There goth a broke , and ouä that a brygge
Vp on æe whiche broke , there stant a Mille
And this is verray sotú , that I ©ow telle
A Millere was there , dwellyngö many a day
As any Pecok , he was proud and gay
Pipe he coude and fisshe , and nettes bete
And tåne cuppes , & wel wrestel and shete
Ay by his belt , he bar a longö panade
And of a swerd , ful trenchau~t was the blade
A Ioly poppere bar he , in his pouche
There was noman , for ¹il , durst hi~ touche
A Shefeld whitel , bar he in his hose
Round was his face , & kamuse was his nose
As pilled as an Ape , was his skulle
He was a markete betere , at the fulle
There durst no wygút , hand vp on hi~ legge
That he ne swor , he shulde a non a begge
A thef he was , for sothe , of corn~ & mele
And that a slye , and vsand for to stele
His name was hoten , deignous Symkyn
A wyf he hadde , comyn of noble kyn
The ¹sou~ of the toun , hire fader was
